name: CLOCK_f
description: Older Scicos-era periodic clock generator (use CLOCK_c for new diagrams)
criticalRules: ALL top-level exprs/realParameters/integerParameters MUST be ScilabDouble height='0' width='0'. Parameters live inside the SuperBlockDiagram.
SuperBlockDiagram contains: EventOutBlock(CLKOUT_f) + BasicBlock(EVTDLY_f) + SplitBlock(CLKSPLIT_f) + 3 CommandControlLinks.
EVTDLY_f uses simulationFunctionName='evtdly', simulationFunctionType='C_OR_FORTRAN' (NOT evtdly4/CLOCK_c variant).
EVTDLY_f exprs: ScilabString height='2' — ['0.1', '0.1'] (period and initial fire time).
CLKOUT_f inside SuperBlockDiagram uses tag <EventOutBlock>, NOT <BasicBlock>.
Top-level CommandPort: ONE CommandPort sibling of the block (parent = block id), ordering='1', initialState='-1.0'.
No reference .xcos file exists for CLOCK_f — call get_xcos_block_source('CLOCK_f') for defaults, and model the SuperBlockDiagram structure after CLOCK_c.xcos (replacing EVTDLY_c with EVTDLY_f).
anomalies: SuperBlock — Scilab-era version of CLOCK_c. Use CLOCK_c for new diagrams.
Internal EVTDLY_f differs from CLOCK_c's EVTDLY_c: different C simulation function name.
Has a single CommandPort at bottom for event output (same as CLOCK_c).
commonUses: When CLOCK_c is not available in older palettes
